findings.description: `await response.json()` — httpx Response.json() is synchronous; `await` on a non-coroutine raises TypeError at runtime. Tests pass only because mock uses AsyncMock. Fix: remove `await` — use `data = response.json()`.

`.order("created_at")` references non-existent column — the shop_reports table defines `reported_at`, not `created_at`. PostgREST will return an error at runtime. Fix: change to `.order("reported_at")`.
Missing `LINEAR_API_KEY` and `LINEAR_TEAM_ID` env vars. CLAUDE.md requires .env.example to document all required vars. Add an Issue Tracker section with both vars.

No health check for new Linear/issue tracker integration. CLAUDE.md: 'When adding a new service, external dependency, or env var, update scripts/doctor.sh with a corresponding health check. The doctor script must grow with the project.'

No error handling around `issue_tracker.create_issue()`. If Linear API fails, exception propagates, status update is skipped, and idempotent_cron lock prevents retry until next day. Reports stuck as 'pending' for 24h then re-sent as duplicates. Wrap in try/except, log the error, and let the cron retry next day without the lock preventing it (or catch and re-raise to avoid locking).

Uses `errors[0]` instead of project's `first()` helper from `backend/core/db.py`. CLAUDE.md: 'Never use unsafe [0] array indexing. Use the project's first() helper function instead.' Guarded by `if errors else` but violates convention.
Form state (field, description) not reset when dialog closes without submission. Old draft text persists on re-open. Add a reset effect or callback when `open` changes to false.
